name: blade-of-the-void-foundation
description: Server-authoritative multiplayer browser game foundation (WebSockets + Three.js), expanded into a multi-instance Gateway + World Server architecture.

scripts.dev:cluster: concurrently -n gateway,world-a,world-b -c blue,green,yellow "npm:gateway" "cross-env SERVER_ID=FRA-01 PORT=8080 npm:world" "cross-env SERVER_ID=FRA-02 PORT=8081 npm:world"
